About Me

Building intelligent systems and loving the journey.

I'm a Georgia Tech M.S. Computer Science graduate (AI concentration, '26) and a UNC Charlotte alumnus (B.S. Computer Science, Magna Cum Laude, '24). I'm passionate about applying machine learning and data engineering to solve real-world problems.

My work spans everything from vision-language models and deep learning to full-stack applications and game AI. I love the full spectrum of training a model, deploying an API, and shipping a polished product.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring. From the top of skyscrapers to canyon rims to snow-covered peaks.

Projects

Things I've built.

Spring 2024 · Research↗
Interpretable Video Understanding Model
Collaborated with Prof. Srijan Das to design a Vision Language Model that predicts human actions across video frames while providing transparent, interpretable rationale. Achieved only ~6% accuracy drop with full explainability.
PyTorchVLMNeural NetworksResearch
2024 · Team Project↗
FastMRI: Region-Aware Image Reconstruction
Enhanced MRI reconstruction using ROI-weighted loss functions for U-Net and Cold Diffusion models. Developed Sobel edge detection to generate dynamic ROI masks. Achieved SSIM 0.7970, a 4.14% improvement over baseline Cold Diffusion.
PyTorchU-NetDiffusion ModelsMedical AI
2026 · Hack_NCState↗
Streetlight Ledger — Privacy Cookie Manager
Hackathon Chrome extension using Gemini Flash AI to classify cookies as Safe, Tracking, or High Risk. Includes gamified "Whac-A-Tracker" with global Firebase leaderboard, privacy scoring, and one-click deletion.
JavaScriptGemini APIFirebaseChrome APIHackathon
Fall 2023 · Team Project↗
Facial Comparison for Student ID Verification
A student verification system using Siamese Networks (VGG backbone) to compare live camera images with stored ID photos. Used Tesseract OCR to extract student IDs and perform database lookups.
PyTorchSiamese NetworkOpenCVTesseract
Spring 2024↗
Interactive Chatbot for Yelp Dataset
Processed millions of Yelp reviews and 150K+ nationwide businesses into an optimized hashmap. Built an interactive chat interface powered by a local Llama 2 model for personalized local business recommendations.
PythonLlama 2NLPLLM
June 2023↗
Diabetes Prediction Model
Engineered a versatile ML model using Scikit-Learn to process and normalize patient health data, predicting diabetes likelihood with logistic regression. Demonstrates end-to-end ML pipeline design.
PythonScikit-LearnLogistic Regression
Fall 2023 · Team Project↗
Chess with Guns
Multiplayer 2D board game built in Unity with an AI opponent. Implemented A-star pathfinding for AI decision-making. A creative blend of chess strategy and arcade action, built by a 3-person team.
C#UnityA* PathfindingGame AI
Team Project↗
Job Offer Comparison App
App for comparing job offers using a weighted score formula adjusted for cost of living. Designed from UML spec — supports salary, bonuses, tuition reimbursement, and custom comparison weights.
JavaAndroidUML Design
